name: Italian Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and heat olive oil in a large frying pan.
2. Add onions and sauté for one minute.
3. Add carrots, celery, mushrooms, and parsley; cook, stirring frequently for 5 minutes.
4. Crumble in the ground beef and cook, stirring frequently until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle flour over the ground beef and stir until well blended.
6. Stir in tomato puree.
7. Gradually add red wine, stirring constantly.
8. Add beef broth and season with salt, pepper, oregano, and garlic as desired.
9. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for about 1 hour or until thickened.
10. Serve with pasta. Makes approximately five cups of sauce.
